era_context: Early Iron Age in the Eastern Mediterranean and Near East. Egypt under the 22nd Dynasty (Libyan) continues its reign. The divided kingdoms of Israel and Judah are in their early period of separate development. Assyria is not yet a dominant imperial power. Greece is in the Early Iron Age.
disconfirming_evidence: No disconfirming evidence identified for events listed. No events are documented for this specific year.
historiographic_note: Documentation for this year is negligible. No contemporary sources record specific events for 976 BCE. The historical record for this year is essentially blank, reflecting the general sparseness of documentation for the early Iron Age.
